prerequisite: Slim SEO plugin must be installed and active
notes: Works on any post type — posts, pages, products, and custom post types.
Slim SEO stores all SEO data in a single serialized post meta key: slim_seo.
Each endpoint changes only the targeted field; all other fields (images, canonical URL, noindex) are left untouched.
If no Slim SEO meta exists yet for a post, a new entry is created automatically.
The API class only loads when Slim SEO is active — no overhead otherwise.

request_body.title: Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman

update_seo_title.validation: title is sanitized with sanitize_text_field() — HTML tags are stripped.

body.title: Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman

error_responses.when: Request body is missing the 'title' field.
The post ID does not exist.

request_body.description: Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD. Available in sizes S–XXL.

update_seo_description.validation: description is sanitized with sanitize_textarea_field() — HTML tags are stripped, newlines are preserved.

body.description: Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD. Available in sizes S–XXL.

error_responses.when: Request body is missing the 'description' field.
The post ID does not exist.

set_product_seo_title.desc: Set the SEO meta title for product ID 40289

body.title: Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman

set_product_seo_description.desc: Set the SEO meta description for product ID 40289

body.description: Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD. Available in sizes S–XXL.

set_page_seo_title.desc: Set the SEO meta title for page ID 15

curl_title.command: curl -X PUT https://yoursite.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/40289/title -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman"}'

curl_description.command: curl -X PUT https://yoursite.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/40289/description -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"description":"Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD."}'
